roles.label: Ops Admin
roles.scope: Portfolio control, audit, commercial and report export

roles.label: Field Technician
roles.scope: Service execution, proof capture and quick field tasks

roles.label: Account Lead
roles.scope: Renewal risk, client proof packs and follow-up ownership

roles.label: Finance and Compliance
roles.scope: Billing, receivables, access permits and document clearance

readiness.label: Independent brother app
readiness.evidence: DR FOREST FM Ops runs as a standalone project without changing FiveApp/FiveCrop.

readiness.label: Core FM control flow
readiness.evidence: Clients, walls, sensors, incidents, service, calendar, dispatch, stock, proof and audit are connected.

readiness.label: Commercial and governance flow
readiness.evidence: SLA, renewal, billing, compliance and ESG report metrics are visible in the control center.

readiness.label: Interactive evidence loop
readiness.evidence: Key actions write local state and create audit events for demo traceability.

readiness.label: Production backend
readiness.evidence: The MVP uses JSON and localStorage; real database, auth and APIs are next-stage work.

quickTemplates.label: Ad-hoc care task
quickTemplates.defaultNote: Check plant health, capture photo evidence and update client note.

quickTemplates.label: Proof gap task
quickTemplates.defaultNote: Collect missing proof before report export.

quickTemplates.label: Client callback
quickTemplates.defaultNote: Confirm client-facing next step and owner.

handoffCriteria.label: Demo-ready
handoffCriteria.rule: A user can open the app, switch roles, operate key workflows, export a report and see the audit trail.

handoffCriteria.label: MVP boundary
handoffCriteria.rule: The app validates the operating model; production data, authentication and integrations remain phase 2.

handoffCriteria.label: Review next
handoffCriteria.rule: After this checkpoint, product review should decide whether to prioritize backend, mobile technician flow or customer portal.
